message:
feat(nn): add buffer registration to BatchNorm1d training + comprehensive module registration tests

BatchNorm1d training forward pass:
- After computing running mean/variance, create proper tensor node
  buffers and register them via upsert_registered_buffer so they
  participate in state_dict serialization and named_buffers iteration
- Track num_batches_tracked as a registered buffer
- Use let-chain pattern for named_persistent_buffers (clippy style)

Formatting:
- Collapse single-field enum variants to one line (clippy style)
- Reformat long write!() calls

New tests:
- batchnorm1d_register_extra_params_and_buffers: verify custom
  parameters and buffers appear in named_parameters/named_buffers
- batchnorm1d_register_none_slots_not_in_iterators: verify None
  slots are tracked in slot lists but excluded from value iterators
- batchnorm_register_name_validation_and_conflicts: verify name
  conflict detection across parameter and buffer namespaces

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
